title: New UI
description: Minecraft has been unupdated in many parts of UI, never got a new animation or sound effect... let's get new stuff with this!
body:
# 🖥️ New UI – A Fresh Look for Minecraft ## 🚀 Introduction Since the earliest versions of **Minecraft**, the user interface (UI) has remained largely unchanged, never receiving new **animations** or **sound effects**. Some menus feel outdated or uninspired, making them less appealing to look at. ## 🎨 What is **New UI**? 🔹 **New UI** is designed to **refresh** Minecraft’s interface, giving it a more **modern** look. 🔹 It incorporates **Ore UI** textures and other visual enhancements to improve the overall aesthetic. ## ✨ Key Features ✅ **New animations** to make the UI feel more dynamic. ![Hover animation on buttons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aQCPwNzV/images/5471752c51eae29a34b68b0e102e373746fa6b41.gif)
✅ **More sound effects** for a richer experience.
✅ **Updated visuals** to replace dull or outdated menus. ![New world creation screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aQCPwNzV/images/1c6f06b60d27d54ba24b36b15c821ab4e3ce2285.png) With **New UI**, Minecraft’s interface won’t just be functional—it will also look and feel **better than ever**! 🚀
Frequently Asked Questions **NO SODIUM, HOW AM I SUPPOSED TO ENJOY THE GAME**
You are right, the experience without any optimization ideal for you device maybe can be laggy, use this modpack as a base for your own private if you really want daily use of this **FOUND A BUG, WHERE CAN I REPORT IT?**
Thanks to be interested in reporting bugs, for now this modpack doesn't have an issue tracker, come in the next days to check if something's changed!
